title: Procheiron memory record
description: One JSON object per non-empty line of {paths.memory}/index/memories.jsonl. This schema is the single-record contract. Cross-record checks (duplicate id, corroborating promotion audit event, self-review, supersession-pair consistency, known-actor membership) are NOT expressible in JSON Schema and remain in the consuming validator (see ../staged_diffs/validator_consumes_schemas.staged.md and severity_map.json). Mirrors validate_procheiron2.py constants and memory_propose.py write contract as of 2026-06-12.

id.description: mem_YYYYMMDD_slug[_digest]. Pattern is advisory (validator does not currently enforce shape); see severity_map.json.

type.description: MEMORY_TYPES. Validator warns (not errors) on out-of-set; severity=warning.

scope.description: MEMORY_SCOPES. Validator warns on out-of-set; severity=warning.

profile.description: Deployment profile this record belongs to.

statement.description: Declarative memory text. maxLength mirrors memory_propose STATEMENT_MAX; validator does not currently bound length, so length overflow is severity=warning.

confidence.description: Numeric in [0,1]. JSON booleans are not numbers, matching the validator's explicit bool exclusion.

source_paths.description: Root-relative or {paths.<key>}/... token form. Machine-absolute paths are forbidden only when the active profile lint sets forbid_absolute_paths_in_memory_records (profile-conditional, enforced by the validator, not by this base schema).

supersedes.description: Structured supersession targets. Every entry must have a matching supersessions.jsonl pair (cross-record check, validator-supplemented).

created_by.description: Agent id. Known-actor membership is a profile-conditional cross-check (validator-supplemented), not enforced here.

reviewed_by.description: Reviewer agent id, or null. Must be string-or-null; a list-typed value is severity=error (impersonation guard).

allOf.$comment: active/validated records must carry independent review metadata (validate_procheiron2 lines 440-452). reviewed_by must be present and non-null.
An active record may not be write_policy proposal_only (SCHEMA rule 9; validate_procheiron2 line 441). Promotion sets approved_canonical.
